_doc: Source of truth for what works on the connected ServiceNow instance. Written ONLY by scripts/probe-instance-capabilities.js (npm run probe:quick / probe:full). Read via getCapability() in scripts/lib/capability-report.js — never parse this file directly. Seed entries below are status:unknown until the first probe run. See .claude/rules/capability-report.md.

instance.release_family.expected: Instance build tag parses to a release family name (feeds docs:servicenow --detect)

table_api.read.expected: Table API GET on a core table returns 200

table_api.write.expected: Table API insert/update/delete works on a probe-owned sentinel

table_api.sys_dictionary_writable.expected: Table API PATCH on sys_dictionary lands (metadata edits have a working path)

execute_script.available.expected: God-mode Scripted REST endpoint deployed and executing

execute_script.runs_global_scope.expected: Script execution reports global scope (scoped sandboxes silently drop sys_* writes)

flow_designer.api_available.expected: sys_hub_flow readable — flow health checks possible

sn_aia.installed.expected: AI Agents plugin installed, sn_aia_agent readable

sn_aia.agent_crud_available.expected: sn_aia_agent create/delete works via Table API

sn_aia.external_agent_api_available.expected: External-agent dispatch API (POST /api/sn_aia/agenticai/v1/agent/id/<id>) deployed and property gate on — read-only route+property evidence; the live dispatch proof stays the build-recipe §4 smoke

catalog.writable.expected: sc_cat_item create/delete works via Table API

genai.capability_definitions_readable.expected: GenAI capability framework present and readable (sys_one_extend_capability_definition GET returns 200); provider entitlement still needs a live call

a2a.invocation_authenticated.expected: OAuth client-credentials + a2aauthscope mints a Bearer token

a2a.card_readable.expected: A2A agent-card endpoint returns 200 + protocolVersion for a Bearer-authenticated GET (informational until a consumer branches on it)
